body.data: {"query":"query { getPackageVersion(name: \"python\") { version repository homepage distribution { downloadUrl size } } }"}

items.docs: Resolve a single package version and its distribution download URL.

body.data: {"query":"query GetPackage($name: String!) { getPackage(name: $name) { name namespace private versions { version createdAt distribution { downloadUrl size } } } }","variables":{"name":"wasmer/winterjs"}}

items.docs: Resolve a package and all of its versions by fully-qualified name.

body.data: {"query":"query { getInterfaceVersion(name: \"wasi\", version: \"latest\") { interface { name description } packageVersions { edges { node { version package { name } distribution { downloadUrl } } } } } }"}

items.docs: Resolve packages implementing a given interface, such as WASI.

body.data: {"query":"mutation PublishPackage($input: PublishPackageInput!) { publishPackage(input: $input) { success packageVersion { version package { name } } } }","variables":{"input":{"name":"my-namespace/my-package","version":"0.1.0","manifest":{},"file":"<signed-upload-url>"}}}

items.docs: Publish a package version to the registry (requires a wap_* Bearer token).

body.data: {"query":"query GetDeployApp($owner: String!, $name: String!) { getDeployApp(owner: $owner, name: $name) { id name url activeVersion { id version url createdAt } } }","variables":{"owner":"wasmer","name":"my-app"}}

items.docs: Resolve a Wasmer Edge app and its active deployment version.

body.data: {"query":"mutation DeployApp($input: DeployAppInput!) { deployApp(input: $input) { deployAppVersion { id url app { name } } } }","variables":{"input":{"name":"my-app","owner":"wasmer","config":{"kind":"wasmer.io/App.v0","name":"my-app","package":"wasmer/winterjs"}}}}

items.docs: Deploy a package as an app to Wasmer Edge (requires a wap_* Bearer token).

body.data: {"query":"query { viewer { username email namespaces { edges { node { name } } } } }"}

items.docs: Resolve the currently authenticated user via a wap_* Bearer token.
